name: CARE Runtime
source_reference: screenshot supplied by user; official public source URL required
allowed_use_boundary: Use only as provisional intake evidence.
Do not treat as an official framework source until a public source URL or source artifact is recorded.
Do not use as certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority.
claims: A provisional framework entry exists in the external-frameworks index.
The entry can be represented as source-blocked intake state.
The entry can be tested for fail-closed behavior when official source evidence is missing.
non_claims: No official source verification is claimed.

transition_table_mapping.source_reference: screenshot supplied by user; official public source URL required
transition_table_mapping.non_claims: no official source verification, certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority
transition_table_mapping.output_artifact_type: source-blocked external framework manifest and compatibility report
transition_table_mapping.actor_or_authority_model: unknown until official source is provided
transition_table_mapping.evidence_model: provisional user-supplied screenshot context; official source missing
transition_table_mapping.delegation_model: unknown until official source is provided
transition_table_mapping.reconstruction_model: provisional manifest plus report can reconstruct why testing is blocked
transition_table_mapping.StegVerse_ecosystem_overlap: intake, source sufficiency, transition-table blocking behavior
transition_table_mapping.fail_closed_conditions: official source missing, source version missing, undefined overlap, authority overclaim

StegVerse_ecosystem_overlap.documentation_surface: wiki reference requires source upgrade before compatibility cycle completion

fail_closed_conditions: allowed-use boundary cannot be confirmed from official source
claims or non-claims cannot be confirmed from official source
any certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority claim appears
